calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-13-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff and Opposing Party Bob Wright, (415) 863-2459, appeared in Propria Persona
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT JOHN FANNIN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND; no opposition filed. Court will prepare an order. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-13-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff and Moving Party Bob Wright, (415) 863-2459, appeared in Propria Persona
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF BOB WRIGHT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: OFF CALENDAR because demurrer was sustained without leave to amend and the demurrer was filed before the summary judgment motion. Court will prepare an order. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-29-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Bob Wright PLAINTIF Propria Persona (415)863-2459

RULING:
A R G U E D. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. PROOF OF SERVICE PRESENTED TO COURT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:
PLAINTIFF BOB WRIGHT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: DENIED; no VALID proof of service. (301/AJR) Reporter: Joyce Long CSR #8620

Mtn To Quash Svc Of Summons
Off Calendar Nov-08-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
John Fannin, Defendant Propria Persona
Bob Wright, Plaintiff Propria Persona

RULING:
DEFENDANT JOHN FANNIN'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is DENIED; declaration of service is not valid. Defendant has 5 days leave to file his answer from notice of entry of order. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
